member.name: T:Domain.Common.BaseDomainEvent
member.summary: Base class for all domain events. Provides default EventId and OccurredAt.

member.name: T:Domain.Common.BaseEntity
member.summary: Base class for all domain entities. Provides Id, and Domain Event raising/clearing support.

member.name: T:Domain.Common.DomainException
member.summary: Represents a business rule violation in the domain layer. Should be caught at the Application layer and translated to 400/422 responses.

member.name: T:Domain.Common.IDomainEvent
member.summary: Marker interface for all domain events. Implements INotification so MediatR can dispatch them.

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Booking
member.summary: Booking aggregate root — encapsulates all booking state transitions. Events: BookingCreatedEvent, BookingCompletedEvent, BookingCancelledEvent, RefundRequestedEvent, BookingRefundedEvent.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Booking.Create(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Decimal,System.Collections.Generic.List{Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.BookingTicket},System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a new booking and raise BookingCreatedEvent. Seat locking (Redis) will be handled by the event handler.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Booking.CreateAtCounter(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Decimal,System.Collections.Generic.List{Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.BookingTicket})
member.summary: Create a new booking at the counter by a staff member. Bypasses online expiry and marks as immediately confirmed once payment is added.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Booking.MarkAsCheckedIn
member.summary: Legacy: used by old Infrastructure services. Prefer CheckIn().

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Booking.MarkAsCompleted
member.summary: Legacy: used by old Infrastructure services. Sets status to Completed directly.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Booking.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Decimal,System.Collections.Generic.List{Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.BookingTicket},Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Payment)
member.summary: Legacy constructor for backward compatibility with old services.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Booking.CreateId
member.summary: Legacy no-op: Id is auto-generated by BaseEntity. Kept for backward compat.

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Payment
member.summary: Payment entity with full lifecycle status tracking.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Payment.CreatePending(System.Guid,System.Decimal,System.String)
member.summary: Create a pending payment for a new booking.

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.BookingAggregate.Refund
member.summary: Represents a refund request within a booking. Created when customer requests refund; status updated by admin approval.

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.CinemaAggregate.Screen
member.summary: Screen entity — represents a cinema screen/room. Enhanced with LinkCoupleSeats() for pair-linking seats.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.CinemaAggregate.Screen.LinkCoupleSeats(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Link two adjacent seats as a couple pair. Both seats must exist in this screen and be in the same row.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.CinemaAggregate.Screen.UnlinkCoupleSeats(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Unlink a previously linked couple seat pair.

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.CinemaAggregate.Seat
member.summary: Seat entity enhanced with blocking reasons and couple-seat linking support.

member.name: P:Domain.Entities.CinemaAggregate.Seat.BlockReason
member.summary: Reason why seat is blocked (e.g., "Maintenance", "VIP reserved")

member.name: P:Domain.Entities.CinemaAggregate.Seat.LinkedSeatNumber
member.summary: Seat number of the linked partner (for couple/double seats)

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.CinemaAggregate.Seat.CanLinkAsCouple(System.Int32)
member.summary: Check if this seat can be linked as couple with a partner seat number.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.CinemaAggregate.Seat.IsBookable
member.summary: Returns true if this seat can be selected for a new booking.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.CinemaAggregate.Seat.LinkWithSeat(System.Int32)
member.summary: Link this seat with another seat number to form a couple seat pair.

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.ConcessionAggregate.ConcessionSale
member.summary: ConcessionSale aggregate — enhanced with SubTotal, DiscountAmount, AddItem() with auto-recalculation, and RecalculateTotal().

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.ConcessionAggregate.ConcessionSaleItem
member.summary: ConcessionSaleItem — enhanced with LineTotal computed property.

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.InventoryAggregate.InventoryItem
member.summary: InventoryItem aggregate — tracks concession stock with restock/deduct audit trail. Raises LowStockAlertEvent when stock falls at or below minimum threshold.

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.InventoryAggregate.InventoryTransaction
member.summary: Audit trail entity for inventory stock movements (restock/deduction).

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.PromotionAggregate.Promotion
member.summary: Promotion aggregate — supports percentage/fixed discounts with constraints.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.PromotionAggregate.Promotion.Evaluate(System.Decimal,System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Nullable{System.Guid},System.Int32)
member.summary: Validate and calculate discount for a given order total.
Update promotion details (for admin management).

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.ShowtimeAggregate.Showtime
member.summary: Showtime aggregate root — represents a movie screening at a specific screen/time. Tracks seat capacity and raises events on status changes.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.ShowtimeAggregate.Showtime.Reschedule(System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Reschedule a showtime to a new date/time. Only allowed when showtime is Scheduled or Confirmed and has no booked seats.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.ShowtimeAggregate.Showtime.#ctor(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Guid,System.DateTime,System.DateTime,System.DateTime,Domain.Entities.ShowtimeAggregate.Enum.ShowtimeStatus)
member.summary: Legacy constructor for backward compatibility with old Infrastructure services.

member.name: T:Domain.Entities.ShowtimeAggregate.ShowtimePricing
member.summary: ShowtimePricing — links a seat type to its price for a specific showtime. Enhanced with ScreenSurcharge (e.g., IMAX, 3D surcharge) and Calculate() factory.

member.name: M:Domain.Entities.ShowtimeAggregate.ShowtimePricing.Calculate(System.Guid,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Factory method: calculates final price from base, seat multiplier, tier, and screen surcharge.

member.name: T:Domain.Events.BookingCancelledEvent
member.summary: Raised when a booking is cancelled (before payment or due to expiry).

member.name: T:Domain.Events.BookingCompletedEvent
member.summary: Raised when payment is confirmed and booking is complete.

member.name: T:Domain.Events.BookingCreatedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a new booking is created and awaiting payment.

member.name: T:Domain.Events.BookingRefundedEvent
member.summary: Raised when admin approves a refund and money is being returned.

member.name: T:Domain.Events.LowStockAlertEvent
member.summary: Raised when inventory stock falls at or below the minimum threshold.

member.name: T:Domain.Events.RefundRequestedEvent
member.summary: Raised when a refund is requested by the customer.

member.name: T:Domain.Events.ShowtimeCancelledEvent
member.summary: Raised when a showtime is cancelled — all bookings must be refunded.

member.name: T:Domain.Services.BookingRules
member.summary: Stateless domain service that enforces booking creation rules. Rules: 1. Cannot book within 1 hour of showtime start 2. Maximum 8 tickets per booking 3. Must have enough available seats 4. All selected seats must be bookable (active + not blocked) 5. Couple seats must be booked as a pair

member.name: M:Domain.Services.BookingRules.ValidateBookingTime(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Lightweight time check — usable from Application handlers without Seat entities.

member.name: M:Domain.Services.BookingRules.ValidateTicketCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Lightweight ticket count check.

member.name: T:Domain.Services.RefundPolicy
member.summary: Stateless domain service that encapsulates the cinema's refund policy. Policy Rules (based on hours remaining before showtime): - More than 24h: 100% refund - 12–24h: 80% refund - 4–12h: 50% refund - Less than 4h: No refund - Already checked in: No refund
